title: Windows Rare Process Detection (Stacking)
description: Identifies rarely-seen processes on Windows endpoints. Uses the rare value hunting technique (Threat Hunter's Cookbook: Sorting/Stacking method) to surface processes that appear fewer than 80 times across the active search window, which keeps the demo resilient for a 14-day dataset and repeated reingestion while still highlighting uncommon attacker tooling.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' and 'Process Name' != '' | stats count as executions by 'Process Name' | sort executions | head 25
